ddl:
CREATE TABLE `alma-bq-extraction-2026.analytics.cmf_regulatory_report`
(
  report_month DATE NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="First day of reporting month"),
  fund_id STRING NOT NULL,
  fund_name STRING,
  cmf_rut STRING OPTIONS(description="CMF regulator RUT"),
  eom_aum_clp NUMERIC NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="End of month AUM"),
  eom_investor_count INT64,
  monthly_deposits_clp NUMERIC,
  monthly_withdrawals_clp NUMERIC,
  monthly_return_pct FLOAT64,
  management_fee_collected_clp NUMERIC,
  generated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
)
OPTIONS(
  expiration_timestamp=TIMESTAMP "2026-05-15T21:17:34.228Z",
  description="CMF regulatory report — monthly filing data"
);

CREATE TABLE `alma-bq-extraction-2026.analytics.daily_aum`
(
  report_date DATE NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Reporting date"),
  fund_id STRING NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Fund identifier"),
  fund_name STRING OPTIONS(description="Fund display name"),
  total_aum_clp NUMERIC NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Total AUM in CLP"),
  total_aum_usd NUMERIC OPTIONS(description="Total AUM in USD"),
  investor_count INT64 OPTIONS(description="Number of active investors"),
  daily_net_flow_clp NUMERIC OPTIONS(description="Net deposits - withdrawals"),
  daily_return_pct FLOAT64 OPTIONS(description="Daily return %")
)
PARTITION BY report_date
OPTIONS(
  partition_expiration_days=60.0,
  description="Daily AUM per fund — the core metric Fintual reports to CMF"
);

CREATE TABLE `alma-bq-extraction-2026.analytics.user_portfolio`
(
  user_id STRING NOT NULL,
  fund_id STRING NOT NULL,
  shares_held FLOAT64 NOT NULL,
  current_value_clp NUMERIC,
  total_deposited_clp NUMERIC,
  total_withdrawn_clp NUMERIC,
  unrealized_gain_clp NUMERIC,
  first_investment_date DATE,
  last_transaction_date DATE,
  snapshot_date DATE NOT NULL
)
OPTIONS(
  expiration_timestamp=TIMESTAMP "2026-05-15T21:17:34.213Z",
  description="Current portfolio snapshot per user"
);

CREATE TABLE `alma-bq-extraction-2026.raw.funds`
(
  fund_id STRING NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Unique fund identifier"),
  fund_name STRING NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Public fund name"),
  fund_type STRING OPTIONS(description="e.g. mutual_fund, etf, money_market"),
  currency STRING OPTIONS(description="ISO 4217 currency code"),
  inception_date DATE OPTIONS(description="Fund launch date"),
  is_active BOOL OPTIONS(description="Whether fund is currently active"),
  cmf_rut STRING OPTIONS(description="Chilean CMF regulator identifier"),
  management_fee_bps INT64 OPTIONS(description="Annual management fee in basis points"),
  loaded_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Ingestion timestamp")
)
OPTIONS(
  expiration_timestamp=TIMESTAMP "2026-05-15T21:17:34.481Z",
  description="Fund master data from admin system"
);

CREATE TABLE `alma-bq-extraction-2026.raw.nav_history`
(
  fund_id STRING NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Fund identifier"),
  nav_date DATE NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Valuation date"),
  nav_per_share FLOAT64 NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="NAV per share"),
  total_aum NUMERIC OPTIONS(description="Total assets under management (CLP)"),
  shares_outstanding FLOAT64 OPTIONS(description="Total shares outstanding"),
  daily_return_pct FLOAT64 OPTIONS(description="Daily return percentage"),
  loaded_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Ingestion timestamp")
)
PARTITION BY nav_date
CLUSTER BY fund_id
OPTIONS(
  partition_expiration_days=60.0,
  description="Daily NAV (net asset value) per fund"
);

CREATE TABLE `alma-bq-extraction-2026.raw.transactions`
(
  transaction_id STRING NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Unique transaction ID"),
  user_id STRING NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Investor user ID"),
  fund_id STRING NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Target fund"),
  transaction_type STRING NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="deposit, withdrawal, switch_in, switch_out"),
  amount_clp NUMERIC NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Transaction amount in CLP"),
  amount_usd NUMERIC OPTIONS(description="Transaction amount in USD (if applicable)"),
  shares FLOAT64 OPTIONS(description="Number of fund shares"),
  nav_at_transaction FLOAT64 OPTIONS(description="NAV per share at time of transaction"),
  transaction_date DATE NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Settlement date"),
  status STRING OPTIONS(description="pending, settled, cancelled"),
  source_system STRING OPTIONS(description="Originating system"),
  loaded_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Ingestion timestamp")
)
PARTITION BY transaction_date
CLUSTER BY fund_id, transaction_type
OPTIONS(
  partition_expiration_days=60.0,
  description="Investment transactions (deposits, withdrawals, switches)"
);

CREATE TABLE `alma-bq-extraction-2026.raw.users`
(
  user_id STRING NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Unique user identifier"),
  email_hash STRING OPTIONS(description="Hashed email (PII masked)"),
  registration_date DATE OPTIONS(description="Account creation date"),
  country_code STRING OPTIONS(description="ISO 3166-1 alpha-2"),
  risk_profile STRING OPTIONS(description="conservative, moderate, aggressive"),
  is_qualified_investor BOOL OPTIONS(description="Chilean qualified investor flag"),
  kyc_status STRING OPTIONS(description="pending, approved, rejected"),
  loaded_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL OPTIONS(description="Ingestion timestamp")
)
OPTIONS(
  expiration_timestamp=TIMESTAMP "2026-05-15T21:17:34.249Z",
  description="Investor profiles"
);

CREATE TABLE `alma-bq-extraction-2026.staging.stg_transactions`
(
  transaction_id STRING NOT NULL,
  user_id STRING NOT NULL,
  fund_id STRING NOT NULL,
  transaction_type STRING NOT NULL,
  amount_clp NUMERIC NOT NULL,
  shares FLOAT64,
  transaction_date DATE NOT NULL,
  loaded_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
)
PARTITION BY transaction_date
OPTIONS(
  partition_expiration_days=60.0,
  description="Cleaned transactions — deduped, status filtered, amounts validated"
);

CREATE TABLE `alma-bq-extraction-2026.staging.stg_users`
(
  user_id STRING NOT NULL,
  registration_date DATE,
  country_code STRING,
  risk_profile STRING,
  is_qualified_investor BOOL
)
OPTIONS(
  expiration_timestamp=TIMESTAMP "2026-05-15T21:17:34.097Z",
  description="Cleaned user profiles — KYC approved only"
);
